sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10063" key="a)nti/kthsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίκτησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10063.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">acquisition of</tr_> one thing <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for</tr_> another, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀδελφοῦ ἀ. οὐκ ἔστιν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.481e</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
